sourceMovie.title: All of Us Strangers
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto All of Us Strangers (2023) as a romance theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The romance and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Stranger Than Fiction
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If All of Us Strangers clicked for you, Stranger Than Fiction (2006) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Collateral Beauty
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If All of Us Strangers clicked for you, Collateral Beauty (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and drama, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after All of Us Strangers?
faq.answer: Try Stranger Than Fiction, Collateral Beauty, Never Let Me Go—each shares DNA with All of Us Strangers while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is All of Us Strangers?
faq.answer: All of Us Strangers (2023) is best described as Romance, Drama, Fantasy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is All of Us Strangers worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this romance lane.
